subtasks.description: Generate a multi-step tool invocation plan to retrieve project requirements from Jira, check team availability from calendar API, schedule standup meeting, and share agenda via Slack

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly asks for orchestration of four distinct enterprise tools (Jira, calendar API, meeting scheduler, Slack) in a sequential workflow with dependencies. A single multitool_plan subtask (mid tier) is appropriate because: (1) the request requires composing a tool-call sequence from the enterprise registry, not data retrieval or reconciliation; (2) mid tier is sufficient to handle the moderate complexity of four tool calls with logical sequencing (requirements → availability → scheduling → notification) and conditional outputs; (3) no data reconciliation or policy evaluation is needed—only orchestration. The plan itself will specify the individual tool calls, parameters, and dependencies without requiring separate subtasks per tool."
